questions.question_text: Explain the following: International Business Management International Monetary System International Competitive Advantage Balance of Payment CO 1 1 2 2

UNIT-1 CO Explain the role of IMF and World Bank in International business. 1 Explain the advantages and disadvantages of Globalization. 1 Explain the recent trends and challenges in international business in Indian perspective. 1

UNIT-2 CO Explain the term and types of Trade Barriers? 2 Why FDI is important for any developing nation, explain. 2 Explain the following: Vocal for Local vs Globalisation Drivers of globalization. 2 Note: Q. 1 is compulsory. Subject: International Business Management Subject Code: BMS 304
